text.title: Cross Team Points Calibration Protocol Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Cross Team Points Calibration Protocol output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

required.field: stable slug used to reference this artefact downstream
single named accountable owner (handle / email / role)
the actual answer / chosen option / value produced
at least 2 sentences; cites at least one input artefact by name
list of input names with source paths or URLs
ISO-8601 date the artefact was last validated

forbidden.pattern: rationale that does not reference any input by name
inputs_used is empty AND decision is not 'no-op'
duplicate artefact_id within the same store

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim rationale to no more than 500 chars, preserving numeric claims and named tools.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.
Group near-duplicate inputs, recording the group with member count.

list.item: Every required field populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
owner is a named individual or rotating named role — never a plural pronoun
